# Map-Name--------------------------->  B2B_EDI_EDIFACT_IFTMCS_OceanBillOfLading_OB_V1
# Formats---------------------------->  .JSON -> .EDI
# Direction-------------------------->  OUTBOUND
# Description------------------------>  OPUS MPL (Multienterprise Link) inbound transform to convert an incoming MPL JSon ocean bill of lading canonical to the EDIFACT IFTMCS Ocean bill of lading transaction format.
# Message Type ---------------------->  EDIFACT IFTMCS
# Business Process------------------->  MULTIENTERPRISE_PROCESS_CONNECT
# Transaction type------------------->  MPC_OCEAN_BILL_OF_LADING
# Source Object Name----------------->  canonicalOceanBillOfLading
# Target Object Name----------------->  EDIFACT IFTMCS
# LinkIdentifier/ServiceLinks-------->  N/A
#
# How to run this script:
#
# Command:
# ./transformerList.sh -m=B2B_EDI_EDIFACT_IFTMCS_OceanBillOfLading_OB_V1 -l=../testdata/json/ob/MPC/B2B_EDI_EDIFACT_IFTMCS_OceanBillOfLading_OB/0_B2B_EDI_EDIFACT_IFTMCS_OceanBillOfLading_OB_V1_List.txt -e=.edi -c=../testdata/json/ob/MPC/B2B_EDI_EDIFACT_IFTMCS_OceanBillOfLading_OB/VALIDATED -o=../Results/MAPS-3584-B2B_EDI_EDIFACT_IFTMCS_OceanBillOfLading_OB_V1
